query:
SHOW COLUMNS FROM series;
SELECT s.id, s.code, s.name, s.laneId, s.pillarId, l.code as laneCode, p.code as pillarCode FROM series s JOIN lanes l ON s.laneId = l.id JOIN pillars p ON s.pillarId = p.id ORDER BY l.code, p.code LIMIT 40;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Wmw2s9e6VwZQ1V.ed7cfaa6430e --database 5DQjKtUEL6F458wSzFzJar --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM series;
SELECT s.id, s.code, s.name, s.laneId, s.pillarId, l.code as laneCode, p.code as pillarCode FROM series s JOIN lanes l ON s.laneId = l.id JOIN pillars p ON s.pillarId = p.id ORDER BY l.code, p.code LIMIT 40;
